summary.description: One- to three-sentence overall assessment of the change, including whether it appears safe to merge.

walkthrough.description: Optional longer markdown walkthrough (file-by-file or thematic). Empty string if not useful.

mermaid.description: Optional Mermaid diagram source describing changed control flow. The text inside (without the ```mermaid fence). Empty string if not applicable.

findings.description: Inline review comments. Empty array if there is nothing to flag.

path.description: Repository-relative path of the file the finding applies to.

line_start.description: 1-based line number in the new file content.

line_end.description: 1-based inclusive end line. Set to null (or to line_start) for a single-line finding.

message.description: Concrete, actionable comment for the PR author.
